title: DataRPG
description: Explore a amazing RPG world without dependency bureaucracy.
body:
# DataRPG
DataRPG is a simple join-and-play experimental RPG adventure with a carefully made ecosystem to let you have a incredible adventure as easy as entering a server.

[Play on our servers](https://discord.gg/hcCMBUqksA)

## What exactly is DataRPG?
DataRPG is not a modpack and not a datapack (i posted as a modpack cause it's the only option available on modrinth). It's a full collection of datapacks developed by amazing developers and integrated together on a simple but nice RPG world. It's a way to start a RPG adventure without having to worry with required mods, configs, requirements and other stuff. As long as you can play vanilla minecraft (1.20+) you can play DataRPG.

## FAQ?
### Future updates
There still a lot of datapacks to be developed and i want to make DataRPG a really good RPG experience so updates may be not so frequent but they surely gonna be huge!

### Can i use it on my server?
Yes! that's the main idea.

### When on Curseforge?
Maybe.

### Source code on Github?
Not avaliable for now, but coming soon.

### More versions?
Maybe, i don't have much time to work on it but i can give it a try.

## Community
We have a [Discord community](https://discord.gg/hcCMBUqksA) where you can play on our "official" server, hang out or give us ideas to put on DataRPG. Tysm for visiting the project and i hope you like it :3
